hero.title: Ubutabera, Ubunyangamugayo, n'Ubunyamwuga
hero.subtitle: JM Lustitia Omnibus Chambers ni sosiyete y'abanyamategeko mu Rwanda itanga inama mu by'amategeko, kuburanira abantu, serivisi za noteri, amategeko y'ubucuruzi, n'umuryango mu mijyi ya Kigali na Musanze.

services.title: Imirimo y'amategeko
services.subtitle: Inzego z’amategeko zijyanye n’ibyo ukeneye, zigamije gutanga ubufasha n’ibisubizo byizewe kandi bikwiye ku bibazo byawe by’amategeko.
services.whyChooseUs: Kuki wahitamo JM Lustitia Omnibus Chambers?
services.scheduleConsultation: Saba inama n’itsinda ryacu ry’inzobere mu mategeko kugira ngo muganire ku byo ukeneye byihariye, ubone ubujyanama bw’umwuga mu mategeko, kandi musuzume ibisubizo byiza bishoboka ku kibazo cyawe.
services.expertise: Ubumenyi bwimbitse mu gihugu no mu karere
services.process_step1_text: Tubanza kumva neza ibyo mukeneye n'intego zanyu mu mategeko.
services.process_step2_text: Inzobere zacu zitegura ingamba zihariye zishingiye ku kirego cyanyu.
services.process_step3_text: Tuguhagararira mu buryo bw’ubunyamwuga n’ubwitonzi buhanitse.
services.process_step4_text: Dukora uko dushoboye kugira ngo tugere ku ntsinzi ikubereye.

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.subTitle: Turi hano kugira ngo tugufashe mu bibazo byawe byose by’amategeko. Twandikire ukoresheje imwe mu nzira ziri hasi aha.
contact.name: Amazina Yombi
contact.yourMessage: Andika ubutumwa burambuye hano ku bijyanye n'inama ushaka
contact.MondayFriday: Ku wa mbere kugeza ku wa gatanu
contact.successText: Urakoze kutwandikira, twakiriye ubutumwa bwawe kandi tuzagusubiza vuba.

chatbot.disclaimer: Uru rubuga rutanga amakuru rusange ku mategeko gusa, ntabwo rusimbura inama z'umunyamategeko w'inzobere.
chatbot.legal_only: Nshobora gufasha mu bibazo bijyanye n'amategeko gusa.

articles.title: Inyandiko
articles.subTitle: Komeza kumenya amakuru agezweho binyuze mu nyandiko zanditswe n’abahanga hamwe n’ubusesenguzi bw’amategeko butanga agaciro buvuye muri JM Iustitia Omnibus Chambers.

activity.title: Ibikorwa
activity.subTitle: JM Iustitia Omnibus Chambers itanga amakuru ku bikorwa byayo by’amategeko, ubufatanye n’abandi bafatanyabikorwa, n’imikoranire n’ibigo by’amategeko.

news.title: Amakuru
news.subTitle: Komeza kumenya amakuru mashya n’andi makuru agezweho ajyanye n’amategeko atangwa na JM Lustitia Omnibus Chambers.

careers.title: Imyanya y'akazi
careers.subTitle: Sangira natwe mu rugendo rw'ubunyamwuga mu mategeko.

team.title: Abakozi Bacu
team.subTitle: Mumenye abahanga mu by’amategeko bari muri JM Iustitia Omnibus Chambers.
team.homeDescription: Menya itsinda ryacu ry’inzobere mu mategeko ryiyemeje gufasha abakiliya bacu kugera ku ntsinzi. Duhuza ubumenyi bwimbitse no kwita ku mukiliya ku buryo bwihariye.

about.home: JM Lustitia Omnibus Chambers ni sosiyete y'abanyamategeko mu Rwanda itanga inama mu by'amategeko, kuburanira abantu, serivisi za noteri, amategeko y'ubucuruzi, ay'umuryango, n'ay'umutungo mu mijyi ya Kigali na Musanze. Itsinda ryacu ry’abanyamategeko bafite ubunararibonye ryiyemeje gufasha abakiliya bacu kugera ku musaruro mwiza ushoboka.
about.firstDesc1: JM Lustitia Omnibus Chambers ni sosiyete y’abanyamategeko yiyemeje gutanga serivisi z’amategeko zuzuye kandi z’umwuga. Izina ryayo
about.firstDesc2: rigaragaza ubushake budacogora bwo guharanira ubutabera, naho
about.firstDesc3: rikagaragaza ubunararibonye n’ubumenyi bwagutse mu nzego zitandukanye z’amategeko.
about.secondDesc: Twubakiye ku bunyangamugayo n’indashyikirwa, twavuye ku rwego ruto rw’umwuga tugera ku rwego rwizewe mu mategeko, dushingiye ku ntsinzi n’icyizere by’abakiliya bacu.
about.ourMission: Ubutumwa bwacu ni ukutanga serivisi z'amategeko ziharanira ubunyangamugayo, ubunyamwuga, no kumva neza ibikenewe n'abakiliya bacu.
about.ourVision: Icyo twifuza ni ukuba ikigo cy'amategeko cya mbere mu Rwanda, kizwi ku bw'ubwitange mu gushyigikira ubutabera n'ubushobozi bwo gutanga ibisubizo binoze.
whyChooseUs: Ubumenyi bwimbitse mu gihugu no mu karere
